title: Card upgrades, timeline pages & URL filters
features: Card upgrade data for 18 previously missing cards — Armaments, Storm of Steel, Multi-Cast, Malaise, Darkness, Spinner, Enlightenment, Cascade, and more now show correct upgraded descriptions
Timeline epoch detail pages at /timeline/{id} with clean slug-based URLs
Timeline unlock badges are now clickable links to detail pages
URL filter persistence — filters, search, and sort are saved in URL params across all list pages for shareable/back-navigable filtered views
fixes: Star icon rendering in upgraded card descriptions — Glow+, Hidden Cache+, Solar Strike+, Venerate+ no longer show broken [star:N] tags
Capacitor+ and Chaos+ now show upgraded Orb values (repeat upgrade was silently skipped)
Bulk Up+ and Capture Spirit+ now show upgraded values when multiple stats share the same base number
Timeline era display uses proper era names instead of raw era with position number
Era year 0 hidden on timeline list and detail pages
Encounter loss text placeholders resolved with encounter name and 'The adventurer'
api_changes: Cards now include upgrade_description field — the fully resolved description text when upgraded
Epochs now include slug field for URL-friendly lookups (e.g. /api/epochs/the-architect)
Epoch lookup accepts both ID and slug
